pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News + Recent Apps sections.

gist.headline: Fresh Ink
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just pinned the latest news and community apps to the repository bulletin board.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to refresh the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Visitors to the GitHub repository will see the most current news and community apps on the main page.
gist.visual_concept: The monitor robot acting as a newsboy or updating a community bulletin board, with Polly the bee reading a tiny newspaper.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a fresh news clipping to a wooden bulletin board. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny newspaper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
